tasks.instruction: Order a braised chicken rice takeaway on Meituan. The price should not exceed 20 yuan, and short distance is a priority
rubrics: Searched for braised chicken rice takeaways
Filtered takeaways with price not exceeding 20 yuan
Selected a braised chicken rice takeaway that meets the requirements
Placed an order for the selected takeaway
human_reference_operations: swipe up to check more takeaways
select a takeaway that meets the requirements
